description: Risk distribution by likelihood and impact.
purpose: Risk matrix visualization for compliance dashboard.
fromSql: SELECT ecm_ra_likelihood AS likelihood, ecm_ra_impact AS impact, COUNT(*) AS risk_count FROM mt_ecm_risk_assessment WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND ecm_ra_status NOT IN ('closed') GROUP BY ecm_ra_likelihood, ecm_ra_impact ORDER BY risk_count DESC

SELECT ecm_af_severity AS severity, ecm_af_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS finding_count FROM mt_ecm_audit_finding WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY ecm_af_severity, ecm_af_status ORDER BY finding_count DESC
